name: Fida'i of Alamut
description: Assassin cabal. No conventional troops — only assassins, dervishes, and acolytes.
add_rules: Alamut Alone: Cannot include Yüzbaşı, Alchemist, Janissaries, Lions, or Brazen Bulls.
Master Assassin: Must include 1 Master Assassin (uses Assassin profile +LEADER +TOUGH).

Art of Assassination: Each Assassin can buy 1 unique ability — Hallucinogen Disguise (20d), Mirage of Time (15d, -1 DICE to attacks targeting), Secret Paths (10d, delayed deploy), Thunderbolt (20d, +2" movement).
Flock of Assassins: Can include 0-2 Sultanate Assassins.
Assassin Acolytes: Up to 3 Azebs gain INFILTRATOR for +10d each.
Dervishes: 0-4 Dervishes (Azeb profile but +1 DICE Melee, -1 DICE Ranged, NEGATE FEAR, 32mm base).
Killing Squad: 1 Fireteam of any 2 models.

abilities: Uses Sultanate Assassin profile with LEADER and TOUGH.
Art of Assassination: Can buy 1 unique ability.
Whirling Dervish: Hypnotic dance — enemy within 1" at start of their activation must pass Risky Success Roll or activation ends.
